title: Software Update - DFU - Putting app in background during update
scenario: DFU continues successfully when Poly Studio Mobile app is sent to background and then brought back to foreground
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) if an update is available.
5. While the DFU is in progress, press the Home button or recent apps button to put the Poly Studio Mobile app into the background.
6. Wait for a few seconds, then return to the Poly Studio Mobile app by tapping the app icon or selecting it from the recent apps list.
7. Observe the firmware update status on the screen.
expected: The DFU continues to progress or completes successfully. The app shows the update still in progress or a completion confirmation message.
